ddls:
CREATE TABLE "appliance_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was recorded */,
  "aggregate_usage" INTEGER /* Total energy aggregate for all appliances */,
  "dishwasher_usage" INTEGER /* Energy usage of the dishwasher */,
  "fridge_usage" INTEGER /* Energy usage of the refrigerator */,
  "microwave_usage" INTEGER /* Energy usage of the microwave */,
  "washing_machine_usage" INTEGER /* Energy usage of the washing machine */,
  "appliances_running" INTEGER /* Number of appliances running during this usage record */,
  "total_energy_cost" REAL /* Total energy cost based on the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appliance_details" (
  "appliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appliance */,
  "appliance_name" TEXT /* Common name of the appliance (e.g., Dishwasher) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the appliance */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the appliance */,
  "energy_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the appliance */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the appliance was installed */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty of the appliance expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user lives */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the user lives */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_appliance" (
  "user_appliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-appliance association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the appliance */,
  "appliance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appliance owned by the user */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the user purchased the appliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_appliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_appliance_appliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("appliance_id") REFERENCES appliance_details ("appliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_appliance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy cost record */,
  "appliance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appliance associated with this cost */,
  "rate_per_kwh" REAL /* Cost of energy per kilowatt-hour for the appliance */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the rate becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_costs_appliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("appliance_id") REFERENCES appliance_details ("appliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appliance_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "appliance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appliance that received maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance event */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details about the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appliance_maintenance_appliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("appliance_id") REFERENCES appliance_details ("appliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the notification setting */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., usage alert, maintenance reminder) */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the notification is enabled or disabled */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the notification (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_savings_tips" (
  "tip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy saving tip */,
  "tip_description" TEXT /* Description of the energy-saving tip */,
  "appliance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appliance associated with this tip */,
  "potential_savings" REAL /* Potential energy savings in kWh by following the tip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_savings_tips_appliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("appliance_id") REFERENCES appliance_details ("appliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "appliance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appliance associated with the alert */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "acknowledged" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been acknowledged by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_alerts_appliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("appliance_id") REFERENCES appliance_details ("appliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appliance_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appliance event */,
  "appliance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appliance associated with the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., start, stop, error) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the event occurred */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appliance_events_appliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("appliance_id") REFERENCES appliance_details ("appliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_usage_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the preference */,
  "appliance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appliance associated with the preference */,
  "preferred_hours" TEXT /* Preferred operating hours for the appliance (e.g., 8am-6pm) */,
  "power_saving_mode" INTEGER /* Whether power saving mode is enabled for the appliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_usage_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_usage_preferences_appliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("appliance_id") REFERENCES appliance_details ("appliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_provider" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of energy provider (e.g., utility, solar, wind) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)
